<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2026 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 47 MB</p>
<p>THE QUINTESSON WAR is at its end! Sacrifices are made! Lives are lost! Life on the Sacred Ring will be changed forever! The most cataclysmic story of the Energon Universe ends here! (Next issue we'll check in on Skuxxoid to provide a bit of a breather, you're going to need it!)</p>
